name: Expansion of eta(q) * eta(q^3) * eta(q^5) * eta(q^15) in powers of q.
formula: Euler transform of period 15 sequence [ -1, -1, -2, -1, -2, -2, -1, -1, -2, -2, -1, -2, -1, -1, -4, ...]. - _Michael Somos_, May 02 2005

a(n) is multiplicative with a(5^e) = 1, a(3^e) = (-1)^e, otherwise a(p^e) = a(p) * a(p^(e-1)) - p * a(p^(e-2)) where a(p) = p minus number of points of elliptic curve modulo p. - _Michael Somos_, Aug 13 2006
G.f. A(x) satisfies 0 = f(A(x), A(x^2), A(x^4)) where f(u, v, w) = v^3 - u*w* (u + 2*v + 4*w). - _Michael Somos_, May 02 2005
G.f. A(x) satisfies 2 * A(x^2) = -(A(x) + A(-x) + 4*A(x^4)), A(x^2)^3 = -A(x) * A(-x) * A(x^4). - _Michael Somos_, Feb 19 2007
program: (PARI) {a(n) = if( n<1, 0, ellak( ellinit([ 1, 1, 1, 0, 0], 1), n))}; /* _Michael Somos_, Aug 13 2006 */

(PARI) {a(n) = my(A, p, e, x, y, a0, a1); if( n<1, 0, A = factor(n); prod( k=1, matsize(A)[1], [p, e] = A[k, ]; if( p==3, (-1)^e, p==5, 1, a0=1; a1 = y = -if( p==2, 1, sum(x=0, p-1, kronecker( 4*x^3 + 5*x^2 + 2*x + 1, p))); for(i=2, e, x = y*a1 - p*a0; a0=a1; a1=x); a1)))}; /* _Michael Somos_, Aug 13 2006 */
(PARI) {a(n) = my(A); if( n<1, 0, n--; A = x * O(x^n); polcoeff( eta(x + A) * eta(x^3 + A) * eta(x^5 + A) * eta(x^15 + A), n))}; /* _Michael Somos_, May 02 2005 */
